untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'sharp counter-trend momentum breaking established trend pattern' which requires multi-bar pattern recognition and trend invalidation logic not expressible with single-bar indicator comparisons. Specifically: (1) 'established trend pattern' requires historical sequencing (higher highs/lows or lower lows/highs), (2) 'sharp counter-trend momentum' is qualitative and requires threshold calibration not provided in source, (3) interaction between pullback direction and primary trend direction requires conditional logic beyond allowed operators. Provided best-effort approximation using MACD histogram reversal as counter-trend signal proxy.
translation_notes: Signal is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT but implementation requires either LONG or SHORT. Provided both entry/exit pairs with complementary logic. Exit conditions use MACD histogram sign change as proxy for 'sharp counter-trend momentum'. Momentum threshold (zscore) and pullback_duration_bars parameters from original signal could not be translated—recommend manual calibration. ADX > 25 confirms trend presence before entry. Stop loss set conservatively at 2.5% and hold duration at 5 bars due to signal's rapid exit requirement.
